title: iOS: background recording clipboard write unreliable for short recordings
description: Action Button says 'Copied N words' but pasteboard is empty for short recordings (long ones work). Cause: headless intent process suspends after perform() before UIPasteboard flush; detached post-process Task not awaited; no background-task assertion. Fix: wrap stop->clipboard(+postprocess) in a ProcessInfo.performExpiringActivity / UIApplication background task assertion so the process survives until the write commits; use best-available text (result.text || partialText || sharedState); keep dialog word count consistent with what is actually copied. Files: Sources/SpeakiOS/Services/TranscriptionRecordingService.swift, Sources/SpeakiOS/Activity/TranscriptionIntents.swift.
acceptance_criteria: Short (1-3 word) Action Button recording reliably lands on the clipboard; dialog word count matches copied text.
close_reason: Merged to main: PRs #499, #500, #501, #502

title: iOS: background Action Button recordings wipe transcription history
description: Root cause: iOSHistoryManager.init() loads history in a detached Task. The headless Action Button intent accesses iOSHistoryManager.shared cold and calls recordTranscription -> add -> saveHistory() before the async load completes, so it overwrites transcription-history.json with only the newest item(s), destroying prior history. Also unsafe across app/intent processes. Fix: load-if-needed synchronously (or read-modify-write against disk) before any mutate/save; never save from an unloaded state. Add tests. Files: Sources/SpeakiOS/Views/iOSHistoryManager.swift.
acceptance_criteria: Recording via Action Button while app is not running preserves all prior history entries; no data loss; unit test covers the pre-load save race.
close_reason: Merged to main: PRs #499, #500, #501, #502

title: iOS: app crashes intermittently when toggling Action Button recording
description: Two TestFlight crash reports when toggling the Action Button. iOS app has no Sentry; traces are in App Store Connect. Suspected AVAudioEngine/AVAudioSession start in background or Live Activity request. Add defensive audio-start hardening (validate input format, recover from stale HAL device, clean up tap/engine before throw, guard reentrancy) mirroring the macOS recovered-start path; pin exact fault once traces are pulled. Files: Sources/SpeakiOS/Services/TranscriptionRecordingService.swift, audio session/live-transcriber start paths.
acceptance_criteria: Repeated rapid Action Button toggles do not crash; audio-start failures surface a friendly error instead of terminating.
close_reason: Fixed in PR #503: mandatory Live Activity for background AudioRecordingIntent + endActivity race fix

title: Add menu hotkeys and shortcut visibility
description: Add configurable keyboard shortcuts for the left menu Speak/History/Settings views, show shortcuts discreetly next to menu items by default, and add a General setting to hide these hints.
acceptance_criteria: Keyboard settings expose shortcuts for left menu Speak/History/Settings with sensible defaults; shortcuts switch views; menu items show shortcut hints by default; General can toggle hints off; tests/build pass; branch pushed.
close_reason: Added configurable sidebar navigation shortcuts, visible shortcut hints, and General hint toggle.

title: Warn about small local post-processing models
description: Add copy in the local post-processing model settings warning that very small local models often do not follow custom instructions reliably.
acceptance_criteria: Local post-processing model section includes concise user-facing guidance about small model instruction-following limits; tests/build pass; branch pushed.
close_reason: Added local post-processing guidance about small local model instruction-following limits.

title: Allow extended single-key hotkeys
description: Allow non-standard/remapped keyboard keys such as F13 and Insert/Help to be recorded as single-key recording hotkeys without modifiers.
acceptance_criteria: HotKeyRecorder accepts extended function/navigation keys without modifiers; key display mapping includes F13+ extended keys and Insert/Help; tests/build pass; branch pushed.
close_reason: Allowed extended/remapped keys F13-F20 and Insert/Help as single-key hotkeys, added display mappings and coverage, and validated tests/build.

title: Fix keyboard shortcut recorder
description: Keyboard settings shortcut recording no longer detects keys. Port the working local NSEvent recorder pattern from /Users/cm/work/pasta so shortcut capture works reliably.
acceptance_criteria: Shortcut rows detect keyDown events while recording, ignore modifier-only presses, Escape cancels, shortcuts persist through ShortcutManager, tests/build pass, branch pushed.
close_reason: Fixed keyboard shortcut recorder by switching the shared HotKeyRecorder to an explicit local NSEvent recorder, pausing active hotkeys during capture, and preserving the same path for onboarding.

title: Fix live transcription permission recovery
description: User still sees false microphone permission failures and status bar stuck on Transcribing; harden live transcription permission refresh and non-blocking failure cleanup, and shrink post-processing Remote/Local selector.
acceptance_criteria: False permission failures do not leave app stuck in Transcribing; live providers refresh permission state before reporting missing permissions; post-processing selector sizes to text; tests/build pass.
close_reason: Refreshed live permission checks, prevented live failure cleanup from blocking processing state, and shrank the post-processing location selector.

title: Review prerelease branch and fix failing checks
description: PR #431 prerelease/local-models has failing checks. Run independent full-branch reviews with Opus 4.7, Opus 4.6, and Copilot/GPT-5.5, compare findings, fix high-signal issues and failing checks, then validate and push.
acceptance_criteria: Requested model reviews are completed and compared; failing PR checks are diagnosed and fixed; tests/build pass; branch is pushed cleanly.
close_reason: Completed multi-model prerelease review, fixed CI lint blockers and high-signal review findings, validated tests/build.

title: Fix post-processing location switching and prompt debug clarity
description: Post-processing settings can get stuck on Local when clicking Remote, leaving local model settings visible. History prompt debugging also labels the transcript payload as 'User Prompt' and does not separately show the user-authored custom cleanup prompt, making it look like the custom prompt is missing from local post-processing.
acceptance_criteria: Remote/Local post-processing location can be switched reliably; switching Remote selects a cloud post-processing model and shows remote settings; History prompt disclosure separately shows the user-authored cleanup prompt, effective system prompt, and transcript payload; tests/build pass.
close_reason: Implemented earlier in the prerelease cleanup: post-processing Remote/Local switching updates the selected model/settings reliably, and History prompt debugging separates the user-authored cleanup prompt, effective system prompt, and transcript payload. Full tests and release verify pass.

title: Refresh microphone permission before recording
description: Recording can fail with 'Microphone permission has not been granted' even when macOS permission is granted, and the HUD/status can show conflicting state. Refresh microphone permission from the system immediately before building capture health and starting recording so stale cached permission state does not block capture.
acceptance_criteria: Session start refreshes microphone permission before HUD health display and before AudioFileManager gates recording; stale denied cache cannot produce a false microphone permission error; tests/build pass.
close_reason: Refreshed system microphone permission before HUD capture-health display and recording start to avoid stale false-denied state.

title: Expose post-processing prompts in history and strip local thinking tags
description: Qwen3 local post-processing can emit empty <think></think> reasoning tags despite prompt guidance, and History does not show the full system/user prompt payload sent to post-processing. Strip thinking blocks from local post-processing output and add a History disclosure for the full post-processing prompt payload for debugging.
acceptance_criteria: Local post-processing removes Qwen thinking tags from final output; history post-processing details expose system prompt and user/raw transcript payload behind a disclosure; tests cover thinking-tag stripping and prompt payload storage; build/test pass.
close_reason: Stripped Qwen thinking tags from local post-processing output and added history prompt disclosure for post-processing payloads.

title: Update recommended local post-processing models
description: Recommended downloaded local post-processing models still point at older Qwen2.5 tiny models. Switch the default recommendations to current best tiny Qwen3-compatible GGUF models and update tests/UI metadata accordingly.
acceptance_criteria: Local post-processing recommendations prefer current Qwen3 tiny instruct GGUF models; tests assert the new defaults; branch builds and tests pass.
close_reason: Recommended downloaded local post-processing models now use current Qwen3 tiny GGUF defaults with no-thinking prompt guidance.

title: Clean up local models prerelease before merge
description: Review prerelease/local-models for merge readiness and fix high-signal cleanup issues: subprocess pipe draining, local prompt truncation detection, local metadata/accounting, picker state sync, and focused test coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Branch has no known merge-blocking review findings; tests cover local transcription usage accounting and local picker/prompt construction where practical; full test/build verification passes before push.
close_reason: Final prerelease cleanup fixed subprocess pipe draining, truncation detection, local metadata accounting, picker sync, and usage chart coverage.

title: Inject local post-processing prompt as system instructions
description: Downloaded local post-processing models receive the effective user prompt inside the user message but only get a generic local contract as the system role. Align local prompt injection with remote post-processing so Qwen receives the user-defined prompt as authoritative system instructions.
acceptance_criteria: Downloaded local post-processing combines the local safety contract and effective user prompt in the system-role message; raw transcript remains data-only in the user message; regression tests cover the constructed local system prompt.
close_reason: Downloaded local post-processing now places the effective user-defined prompt in the system-role message while keeping transcript text as user data.

title: Require downloaded local models before selection
description: Local transcription and local post-processing settings currently allow selecting local models before they are downloaded/prepared. Update the UI so unavailable local models can be downloaded but not selected until installed, and make selected model rows visually prominent and consistent across local model download views.
acceptance_criteria: Local Batch, Local Streaming where applicable, and Local Post-processing rows do not offer Use/selection for not-installed models; selected installed rows use one consistent prominent highlight pattern; shared row helpers are reused across the local download views where practical.
close_reason: Local model settings now only allow selecting installed local models and use a shared selected-row highlight across local model download views.

title: Normalise local batch model import markers
description: Imported WhisperKit batch models can keep legacy Hugging Face alias IDs/markers, making the UI show a model as ready while the exact resolved WhisperKit model path has not actually been prepared. This can leave Local Batch stuck loading, even though Local Streaming works through the separate sherpa path.
acceptance_criteria: Local Batch imported argmaxinc/whisperkit-coreml aliases are normalised to exact model IDs; stale alias markers do not make batch models appear ready; selected stored local batch IDs are normalised on startup; streaming sources remain separate.
close_reason: Local Batch imported WhisperKit aliases now normalise to exact resolved model IDs and stored selections, preventing stale alias install markers from showing unprepared batch models as ready while keeping streaming sources separate.

title: Apply user prompt to local post-processing context
description: Local post-processing appears not to observe the user-defined prompt/system instruction. Reported reproduction: a prompt expected output with a full stop after each word, but local post-processing did not follow that pattern. Verify whether postProcessingSystemPrompt is injected into the local model context/system prompt and fix the local pipeline so downloaded/local LLM post-processing honours the user prompt. Evidence screenshots: /Users/cm/Desktop/Screenshot 2026-05-14 at 14.04.00.png and /Users/cm/Desktop/Screenshot 2026-05-14 at 14.04.25.png
acceptance_criteria: Local post-processing sends the configured user prompt/system instruction to the local model; a prompt requiring full stops after each word is reflected in the output; UI/model history still show friendly local model names; add regression coverage or a documented manual verification path.
close_reason: Downloaded local post-processing now sends an explicit local system contract and marks user cleanup instructions as authoritative, including formatting-only prompts.

title: Suppress placeholder post-transcription output for empty recordings
description: When a recording contains no speech/no transcript, post-transcription currently outputs the placeholder sentence 'This is a raw transcript.' instead of leaving the result empty. Investigate the empty transcript path and prompt/context handling so no-speech recordings persist/insert an empty transcript rather than generated boilerplate.
acceptance_criteria: Empty or no-speech recordings produce an empty post-processed output; the literal placeholder 'This is a raw transcript.' is not shown or inserted; add regression coverage around empty transcript post-processing if practical.
close_reason: Empty, whitespace-only, and blank-audio-marker transcripts now short-circuit post-processing and return an empty processed output without calling local or remote models.

title: Fix stale Hugging Face local install markers
description: Migrated Hugging Face WhisperKit aliases must use the resolved exact model folder in their model ID/install marker so old imported models are not shown as ready before the real model is downloaded and loaded.
close_reason: Resolved imports now use exact WhisperKit model IDs/install markers so stale markers no longer make models look prepared.

title: Fix Hugging Face local model imports
description: Imported Hugging Face WhisperKit models should show a real model size, resolve ambiguous argmaxinc/whisperkit-coreml aliases to exact model folders, and avoid making first transcription look stuck by preparing the model during install/selection.
close_reason: Resolved Hugging Face WhisperKit aliases to exact sized variants, prepared models during install/selection, and clarified local transcription HUD copy.

title: Migrate AssemblyAI from v3 to v3.5 Pro on all platforms
description: AssemblyAI bumped their model from v3 to v3.5 Pro. Migrate the AssemblyAI transcription integration to v3.5 Pro across BOTH macOS and iOS (streaming + batch as applicable). Verify against the live AssemblyAI API before shipping (endpoint/model identifiers, message schema, keyterms_prompt behaviour, EU host). Key files: Sources/SpeakApp AssemblyAI provider/controller and Sources/SpeakiOS AssemblyAI live transcriber, plus any model catalogue/routing entries and default model IDs. Keep macOS and iOS wiring in sync. Confirm live behaviour (close codes, turn/formatted-turn semantics) still holds under v3.5 Pro.
acceptance_criteria: AssemblyAI uses v3.5 Pro on macOS and iOS; live + batch transcription verified against the real API; model catalogue/defaults updated; no regression in turn handling or keyterms.

title: iOS: history actions — copy raw/polished, reprocess, delete, surface errors
description: Enrich iOSHistoryItem to store raw + post-processed text and errors (mirror Mac HistoryItem). Add per-item actions: copy raw, copy polished, reprocess with current post-processing model (persist polished result), delete, and view errors — matching the Mac history context menu. Files: Sources/SpeakiOS/Views/iOSHistoryModels.swift, HistoryView.swift, HistoryItemRow.swift, post-processing wiring.
acceptance_criteria: Each history item offers copy raw/polished, reprocess (stores polished alongside raw), delete, and shows any captured errors.
close_reason: Merged to main: PRs #499, #500, #501, #502

title: iOS: history 'new recording' marker for background sessions
description: When a background session records while the user is away from the app, show a notification marker/badge on the History entry point directing them to it on next open. Clear the marker once History is viewed. Files: ContentView toolbar, shared 'unseen background transcript' flag.
acceptance_criteria: A badge appears on History after a background recording and clears once History is opened.
close_reason: Merged to main: PRs #499, #500, #501, #502

title: iOS: surface last/live background transcription as the app's current view
description: When a background (Action Button) recording finishes or is in progress, opening the app should show that session as the current transcript (not a stale in-app transcript), with copy/clean-up available. Subscribe ContentView to SharedTranscriptionState / TranscriptionRecordingService. Files: Sources/SpeakiOS/Views/ContentView.swift, SharedTranscriptionState.
acceptance_criteria: After a background recording, opening the app shows that transcript as the current view; a live background session is reflected while running.
close_reason: Merged to main: PRs #499, #500, #501, #502

title: Track MAI-Transcribe wider availability
description: Check weekly whether Microsoft's MAI-Transcribe model is available beyond Microsoft Foundry/MAI Playground (specifically OpenRouter and other major third-party API aggregators). Update this issue with findings and links each check-in. Keep it open until availability is broader than Microsoft-only channels.
acceptance_criteria: Weekly check-in notes with source links are added; issue closes only when MAI-Transcribe is broadly available via at least one major third-party API platform.
notes: 2026-07-02 check: MAI-Transcribe is available beyond Microsoft Foundry and MAI Playground via OpenRouter model microsoft/mai-transcribe-1.5. Sources: https://openrouter.ai/microsoft/mai-transcribe-1.5 and https://microsoft.ai/news/today-were-announcing-3-new-world-class-mai-models-available-in-foundry/. Acceptance is satisfied because a major third-party API platform now lists the model.
close_reason: MAI-Transcribe wider availability confirmed via OpenRouter on 2026-07-02.

title: Improve keyboard navigation coverage
description: Ensure the app and settings remain usable via keyboard navigation where practical for this prerelease pass.
acceptance_criteria: Primary left-menu navigation and settings controls are focusable/tab navigable, shortcut hints support keyboard-only users, and any discovered non-focusable critical controls in touched surfaces are fixed; tests/build pass.
close_reason: Made primary sidebar navigation focusable with shortcut hints and covered touched keyboard navigation surfaces.

title: Align local model download row UI
description: Local streaming model rows use a different structure from local batch and local post-processing download rows, and known streaming model sizes can display as unavailable for previously added sources. Align local streaming rows with the shared local model row pattern and backfill known streaming sizes.
acceptance_criteria: Local batch, local streaming, and local post-processing download rows use the same selected highlight/badge/action structure; local streaming rows show known model sizes; tests/build pass.
close_reason: Current local streaming rows use the shared local model row container, badge, and action pattern and LocalModelManagerTests cover known streaming size backfill.

title: Separate generated language instruction from custom post-processing prompt
description: History prompt debugging shows the generated language instruction and user-authored cleanup prompt on the same line, which makes it harder to see the custom prompt clearly. Insert the custom prompt after a newline/paragraph break from generated prompt parts.
acceptance_criteria: Effective post-processing prompt separates generated language instruction and custom prompt with a newline; regression test covers formatting; build/tests pass.
close_reason: Current PostProcessingManager already separates generated language instructions and custom prompts with a blank line; added regression coverage in PostProcessingManagerTests.

title: Wire sherpa-onnx local streaming runtime
description: Replace the current Local Streaming placeholder with a working sherpa-onnx runtime integration on Apple Silicon. Add runtime install/health checks, model download/prepare, live audio chunk streaming, partial/final transcript handling, and clear failure states while keeping all transcription local.
acceptance_criteria: Local Streaming can install or locate sherpa-onnx, download/prepare a selected Zipformer model, stream microphone audio locally with partial and final transcript events, and surface actionable errors when the runtime is unavailable.
close_reason: Implemented sherpa-onnx local streaming runtime, model download, live controller, and UI wiring.

title: Clarify Local Batch and Local Streaming settings
description: Split Local Batch and Local Streaming language and import surfaces so streaming model sources are tracked separately from WhisperKit batch downloads, while making clear both modes remain local-only.
close_reason: Separated Local Batch and Local Streaming settings, added local-only streaming source tracking, and clarified streaming runtime/download status.

title: Add local streaming architecture
description: Add a dedicated local streaming transcription path under Local Models, avoiding accidental fallback to Apple Speech or cloud live providers.
close_reason: Added explicit local streaming sub-mode, offline-only guard, and prerelease unavailable state.

title: Split local and remote transcription settings
description: Separate transcription settings into local and remote surfaces, with local offline and local streaming as distinct sub-modes.
close_reason: Implemented local/remote settings split with Local Offline and Local Streaming sub-modes.

title: Hide local blank audio marker
description: Filter WhisperKit [BLANK_AUDIO] markers from local transcription results before text insertion or history.
close_reason: Filtered WhisperKit [BLANK_AUDIO] marker from local transcript text

title: Assess local live transcription support
description: Check whether WhisperKit-backed local models can support live streaming transcription in the prerelease and wire it when safe; otherwise make offline-only capability explicit.
close_reason: Confirmed WhisperKit local models are offline batch in this prerelease and guarded local live fallback

title: Add Hugging Face local model import
description: Allow users to discover compatible Hugging Face local transcription models via filtered search and import/install a model so it becomes ready to select in Local Model mode.
close_reason: Added Hugging Face filtered browse/import/install flow for WhisperKit local models

title: Show selected transcription settings only
description: Update macOS transcription settings so mode-specific sections only appear for the currently selected transcription mode.
close_reason: Mode-specific transcription settings now only show for the selected transcription type

title: Upgrade local models prerelease UX
description: Make downloaded local models easier and more instructive to select, download, install, and run in the macOS prerelease app.
close_reason: Upgraded local model settings flow with quick-start guidance, selected model status, and clearer download/use actions

title: Build downloaded local models prerelease
description: Implement a prerelease branch for downloadable local transcription models as a distinct provider family from Apple Speech, keeping the work separate from main until ready.
close_reason: Implemented prerelease local model support, build/test verified

title: Update Renovate packages and live streaming website copy
description: Apply any available package update from Renovate PRs, then update the landing page to emphasise supported live streaming transcription models.
close_reason: Updated dependency pins from recent dependency PRs and refreshed the landing page around live streaming transcription models.

title: Move Beads integration to Copilot CLI
description: Move Beads automatic context priming out of Claude-specific configuration and into the repo-local GitHub Copilot CLI hook location.
close_reason: Moved Beads context priming to GitHub Copilot CLI hook configuration.

title: iOS: port Mac history concepts to iOS (rich model + diagnostics)
description: Epic: port most Mac history concepts to iOS: rich HistoryItem (events, network exchanges, cost, phase timestamps, trigger, diagnostic context, personal corrections), errors-only filter, issue report copy, and error surfacing. The history-actions bead is the first slice. Progressively align iOS history with Sources/SpeakApp/History*.
acceptance_criteria: iOS history model and view progressively reach parity with the Mac history feature set.

title: Add local model post-processing
description: Add an optional local-model post-processing path so downloaded local models can clean up or rewrite transcripts without sending text to cloud LLM providers. Keep this after the local model import/streaming prerelease work.
close_reason: Added local offline post-processing and improved Local Streaming candidate selection UX
